lines.speaker: Leff
lines.text: Elder Krill sent me down here to catch some fish. These fish are boring though. It's much more fun when he lets me actually go properly fishing out at sea, but he says it's important I learn land fishing as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your land fishing is pretty much how we humans always fish.

lines.speaker: Leff
lines.text: Really? I can't imagine just standing there day after day, slowing waiting for a fish to get caught. At least I only have to do it for a little while. Doing the same thing over and over must get so boring!

lines.speaker: Leff
lines.text: Who wants to relax? Wouldn't you rather get out there and have fun?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can do both, you know?
